name: Auth0
description: Monitor Auth0 MFA configuration, user access, and authentication logs for identity compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Go to Auth0 Dashboard > Applications > Create Application
2. Select Machine to Machine
3. Authorize the Auth0 Management API with read:users, read:logs, read:guardian_factors permissions
4. Deploy and copy the access token
5. Paste it below

credentialFields.label: Management API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Create a Machine-to-Machine app authorized for the Auth0 Management API

checks.name: 2FA
checks.description: Verifies that at least one MFA factor is enabled in Auth0 Guardian

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Auth0 users to verify employee access is managed

checks.name: Access Review Log
checks.description: Verifies Auth0 authentication logs are available for access review
